name: log_manager
description: Central logging system for all AgenticToolset activity. Logs tool invocations, LLM decisions, agent switches, and errors to structured JSONL files. Supports querying and session summaries.

data.description: JSON payload for the log entry. Contents vary by action type.

type_filter.description: Filter query results by log type (tool_invocation, llm_decision, agent_switch, error)

last_n.description: Number of recent entries to return (default: 50)
